title: Rabindra Sangeet Evening
description: An evening of Tagore's songs over tea and dim lamplight. Doors open at 5:30; the music starts when the rain does.
additionalInfo: Sharmila Sen has sung Rabindra Sangeet for two decades, from Jorasanko courtyards to Nandan stages. She is joined by Arko Mitra on esraj.

title: Mime & Movement Workshop
description: A three-hour introduction to mime taught by senior students of the Mime Institute of Calcutta. No experience needed — bring loose clothes and curiosity.
additionalInfo: You will learn: the fixed point, the wall, weight and resistance, and a short silent scene to take home. Ages 14+. Limited to 20 seats.

title: College Street in Photographs
description: Thirty black-and-white frames of boipara — the stalls, the sellers, the rain on plastic-wrapped books. On the cafe walls through the end of the month.
additionalInfo: Curated by Ritwik Basu. Prints are silver gelatin, shot on a Yashica twin-lens between 2019 and 2025. All works are for sale; proceeds support the Institute.
